claims: The skill's "AI-powered validation" feature (enabled by default if Codex CLI is installed) sends code diffs to third-party AI services (OpenAI, Google, GitHub Copilot) without explicit user consent or clear disclosure in the primary description. While intended for security validation, this contradicts the skill's safety claims by potentially exposing sensitive code to external servers without transparency about data handling or retention policies.
